Down from a $140 full price, this particular model has only been discounted as low as $100 since 2026 began, with the deal during this sale event providing you with a larger 43% markdown that cuts $60 off the tag for another shot at the all-time lowest tracked price that we last saw during Black Friday and Christmas sales.

items.title: JBL’s Boombox 3 portable Bluetooth speaker drops back to its $300 low for the first time in years on Amazon, more from $40
items.summary:
As part of the soon-to-end Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can find a number of popular JBL speakers benefiting from up to 30% discounts starting from $40. One notable inclusion is the brand’s Boombox 3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker down at $299.95 shipped for the first time on Amazon since 2024 ended. Down from its $500 full price, we’ve seen discounts typically dropping costs to $400 since the start of 2025, though it did go as low as $340. Now, during this sale, you can score it with a $200 markdown that returns it to its all-time lowest tracked price for the first time since Christmas sales in 2024. Below, you’ll also find several of JBL’s other speakers getting Big Spring savings to step up your music enjoyment as warmer weather arrives.
